title: Update the Issuing terms of service acceptance
excerpt: Learn how to present accurate business information for your connected accounts and accept the Issuing terms of service. Platforms must present the account representative with the business information on file for confirmation prior to submission to Stripe Issuing. Make sure that the account representatives update any information that’s no longer accurate: - Business Information (including the Tax Identification Number if applicable) - Name, date of birth, address, and SSN of account representative and beneficial owners Present the account representative with a disclosure stating that Celtic Bank, a member of FDIC, issues the cards.…
